title: selaginella erectifolia
intro: Selaginella erectifolia is a species of spore-producing plant, also known as a lycopod, belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Selaginella erectifolia is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
